name: Siemens
description:
Siemens AG is a German multinational company. It is focused on industrial automation, building automation, rail transport and health technology. Siemens is the largest engineering company in Europe, and holds the position of global market leader in industrial AI, automation, and industrial software. || Siemens is a multinational engineering and electronics company involved in the fields of industry, energy, transportation and healthcare. | Siemens Aktiengesellschaft, a technology company, focuses in the areas of automation and digitalization in Europe, Commonwealth of Independent States, Africa, the Middle East, the Americas, Asia, and Australia. It operates through Digital Industries, Smart Infrastructure, Mobility, Siemens Healthineers, and Siemens Financial Services (SFS) segments. The Digital Industries segment provides automation systems and software for factories, numerical control systems, servo motors, drives and inverters, and integrated automation systems for machine tools and production machines; process control systems, machine-to-machine communication products, sensors and radio frequency identification systems; production and product lifecycle management software, and simulation and testing of mechatronic system. The Smart Infrastructure segment offers products, systems, solutions, services, and software to support sustainable transition from fossil and renewable energy  sources; sustainable buildings and communities; and buildings, electrification, and electrical products. The Mobility segment provides rail passenger and freight transportation, such as metro systems, trams and light rail, and commuter trains, as well as trains and passenger coaches; locomotives and solutions for automated transportation and leasing; products and solutions for rail automation and electrification; maintenance and digital services; and digital and cloud-based solutions, and related services. The Siemens Healthineers segment develops, manufactures, and sells various diagnostic and therapeutic products and services; and provides clinical consulting and training services. The Siemens Financial Services segment offers debt and equity investments; leasing, lending, and working capital; structured, equipment, and project financing; and financial advisory services. The company was founded in 1847 and is headquartered in Munich, Germany. | Siemens empowers customers to transform the industries that form the backbone of economies: industry, transportation, buildings and grids. | Siemens is a tech company whose technology empowers customers to transform the industries that form the backbone of economies: industry, transportation, buildings and grids. As a leading technology company it partners with other companies, industries and innovators to combine the real and the digital worlds. | German multinational conglomerate company | Siemens AG is a German multinational company. It is focused on industrial automation, building automation, rail transport and health technology. Siemens is the largest engineering company in Europe, and holds the position of global market leader in industrial AI, automation, and industrial software. | Automation Machinery Manufacturing | Electrification, automation and digitalization require innovative solutions: Discover Siemens as a strong partner, technological pioneer and responsible employer. | Discover Siemens as a strong partner, technological pioneer and responsible employer. | Siemens Oy provides technology solutions and professional services. The Company offers services such as conserving energy, reducing emissions, logistics, security solutions, and voltage products to industries including energy, infrastructure, financial services, cities, and healthcare. Siemens extends its services worldwide. | The oil and gas industry faces many challenges in exploration, production, transportation, storage, refining and distribution. | The oil and gas industry faces many challenges in exploration, production, transportation, storage, refining and distribution. One of the challenges is to have highly reliable and safe structure of electrification, automation and digitalization. | Siemens Osakeyhtiö (SOY) provides a regional presence for electronics and industrial engineering giant Siemens AG. Its businesses cover wide-ranging areas including Communications, Industry (automation & electrification), Business Services (IT), Energy (generation/transmission/distribution), Building Technologies (HVAC & fire detection), Transportation (rail systems) and Health Care (imaging systems). SOY customers include insurer KELA, the Finnish Defence Forces, The Finnish Rail Administration, The Finnish Road Administration, and paper company UPM-Kymmene. Siemens established a subsidiary in Finland in 1898. Siemens Osakeyhtiö also oversees its subsidiaries located in Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. | It's probably easier to name the things this engineering titan doesn’t do. Siemens is one of the largest electronics and industrial engineering companies in the world. Siemens makes everything from healthcare technology to factory automation equipment, and building technologies to power generation and distribution equipment. The German company has facilities in most corners of the world and serves a global customer base of manufacturers and construction, energy, and healthcare companies. Formed in 1847 as Siemens & Halske, the company's technological innovations include the first long-distance telegraph system in Europe, a high-efficiency dynamo for generating electricity, and the SIMATIC industrial machine automation technology. | Gegenstand des Unternehmens ist:
- Herstellung und der Vertrieb von industriellen Erzeugnissen auf dem Gebiet der Elektrotechnik, des Maschinenbaus, der Feinmechanik und verwandter Technik einschliesslich der Forschung und Entwicklung auf diesen Gebieten.
- Entwicklung und Planung, die Ausführung und der Vertrieb von Anlagen und Teilen von Anlagen zur Erzeugung, Übermittlung und Verarbeitung von Informationen und Energie sowie deren Anwendung auf Prozesse aller Art.
- Herstellung und der Vertrieb von Gütern, die für hergestellten und vertriebenen Erzeugnisse als Zubehör und Hilfsstoffe oder als Hilfsmittelzweckdienlich sind.
- Batterieladegleichrichter Befehlsschalter Bedienterminals für Industrieanlagen Heizöfen, elektrisch Netztransformatoren SchaltdrähteSteuerleitungen Prüfgeräte, elektrisch Elektrogeräte, allgemein. | A technology company focused on industry, infrastructure, mobility, and healthcare. 
#TransformTheEveryday | Siemens AG is a global technology powerhouse that has stood for engineering excellence, innovation, quality, reliability and internationality.One of the world&s;s largest producers of energy-efficient, resource-saving technologies. | Siemens AG (Berlin and Munich) is a global technology powerhouse that has stood for engineering excellence, innovation, quality, reliability and internationality for more than 170 years. Active around the world, the company focuses on intelligent infrastructure for buildings and distributed energy systems and on automation and digitalization in the process and manufacturing industries. Siemens brings together the digital and physical worlds to benefit customers and society. Through Mobility, a leading supplier of intelligent mobility solutions for rail and road transport, Siemens is helping to shape the world market for passenger and freight services. Via its majority stake in the publicly listed company Siemens Healthineers, Siemens is also a world-leading supplier of medical technology and digital health services. In addition, Siemens holds a minority stake in Siemens Energy, a global leader in the transmission and generation of electrical power that has been listed on the stock exchange since September 28, 2020. 
In fiscal 2020, which ended on September 30, 2020, the Siemens Group generated revenue of €57.1 billion and net income of €4.2 billion. As of September 30, 2020, the company had around 293,000 employees worldwide. Further information is available on the Internet at www.siemens.com.

name: Infosys
description:
Infosys Limited provides IT consulting and software services, including e-business, program management and supply chain solutions. The Group's services include application development, product co-development, and system implementation and system engineering. Infosys targets businesses specializing in the insurance, banking, telecommunication and manufacturing sectors. || Infosys provides digital services and consulting to thousands of customers all over the world. With over four decades of experience as a digital services leader, they became the first IT company from India to be listed on NASDAQ. Today, they have roughly 335,000 employees and operate across more than 50 countries worldwide. Infosys manages the systems and operations of global enterprises, and more specifically, makes sure that they are headed in the right direction on their "digital journey". They cater to Aerospace & Defense, Agriculture, Automotive, Chemical Manufacturing, Communication Services, and just about any other industry you can possibly think of. With each enterprise they work with, they hope to foster innovation and provide them with the new realities of business technology today. For those industries, they are experts in Digital Marketing, Digital Workplace Services, Applied AI, Blockchain, Enterprise Agile DevOps, Salesforce, Cybersecurity, etc. Their main services are in the categories of Application Development and Maintenance, Business Process Management, Consulting Services, and Incubating Emerging Offerings. Their services help accelerate productivity and optimize business performance. More specifically, their suite of products within these services include EdgeVerve, Finnacle, Cortex, Meridian, Panaya, Equinox, Wingspan, HELIX, and Polycloud. These platforms help businesses achieve digital transformation through AI and Machine Learning. Overall, Infosys is constantly working to transform organizations by augmenting their core digital capabilities. Infosys helps organizations become better equipped to respond to disruptions in the market as well as move forward effectively whether that is seeking out a new business model, innovation, or advancement in their current operating model. | Infosys is a global leader in technology services and consulting. Infosys enable clients in more than 50 countries to create and execute strategies for their digital transformation. From engineering to application development, knowledge management and business process management, Infosys help their clients find the right problems to solve, and to solve these effectively. | Infosys Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides consulting, technology, outsourcing, and digital services in North America, Europe, India, Switzerland, and internationally. It provides digital marketing and digital workplace, digital commerce, digital experience and interactions, and metaverse; data analytics and AI, applied AI, generative AI, and sustainability; blockchain, engineering, and Internet of Things; enterprise agile DevOps, API economy and microservices, application modernization, cloud, digital process automation, digital supply chain, Microsoft business application and cloud business, service experience transformation, energy transition, Network Transformation Services, Infrastructure Services cyber security, and quality engineering solutions; Oracle, SAP, and Saleforce solutions; Topaz, an AI-first set of services, solutions, and platforms using generative AI technologies; and Aster, a set of AI-amplified marketing services, solutions, and platforms. The company also offers Finacle, a core banking solution; Edge suite of products; Panaya platform, Infosys Equinox, Infosys Live Enterprise Suite, Infosys Wingspan, Infosys Helix, Infosys Meridian, Infosys Polycloud, Infosys Cortex, and Stater digital platforms; and Infosys McCamish, an insurance platform. It serves aerospace and defense, agriculture, automotive, chemical manufacturing, communication, consumer packaged goods, education, engineering procurement and construction, financial, healthcare, high technology, industrial manufacturing, information services and publishing, insurance, life science, logistics and distribution, media, entertainment, mining, oil and gas, private equity, professional, public, retail, semiconductor, travel, hospitality, utilities, and waste management industries. The company has a strategic collaboration with Anthropic PBC for the development of enterprise AI solutions to companies across telecommunications, financial services, manufacturing, and software development. Infosys Limited has strategic collaboration with Intel to develop purpose-built agentic services suite. The company was formerly known as Infosys Technologies Limited and changed its name to Infosys Limited in June 2011. Infosys Limited was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Bengaluru, India. | Infosys is a technology company that offers consulting, outsourcing, cloud infrastructure, program management, and software services. | Infosys is a global IT services provider that provides application development, product co-development, system implementation, and system engineering services. Infosys helps enterprises through strategic consulting, operational leadership, and the co-creation of breakthrough solutions, including mobility, sustainability, big data, and cloud computing. The company provides managed services, cloud infrastructure services, business process outsourcing as a service, and IT services. | Indian multinational technology company | Infosys Limited is an Indian multinational technology company that offers information technology, business consulting, and outsourcing services. name: RA Automation
description: Ra Automation provides engineering services and solutions for industrial automation and materials handling systems. The company delivers automation projects from software and electrical design through to turnkey system implementation, upgrades, and refurbishments. It offers automation consultancy for scoping requirements, specifications, testing, and project oversight. Ra Automation develops an automation management platform and app to centralize stock, documentation, and control software, and to support proactive maintenance. It supplies remote and onsite technical support for PLC, SCADA, HMI, and control systems and sources, delivers, and installs automation parts and components, including alternatives for obsolete items. The company serves sectors such as warehouse automation, airport conveyor systems, and RedZone hardware integration. || Ra Automation provides automation engineering projects, consultancy, management software, technical support, and parts supply for automated, | Ra Automation provides engineering services and solutions for industrial automation and materials handling systems. It supplies remote and onsite technical support for PLC, SCADA, HMI, and control systems and sources, delivers, and installs automation parts and components, including alternatives for obsolete items. The company serves sectors such as warehouse automation, airport conveyor systems, and RedZone hardware integration.

name: S2CONTROL
description: S2Control provides engineering and implementation services for industrial automation systems across sectors such as nuclear, aerospace, automotive, water treatment and food processing. The company designs control system architectures and documentation, selects and supplies instrumentation and control hardware, and programs PLC, SCADA, HMI, drives and robotic systems. S2Control carries out commissioning activities including installation, calibration, functional testing and on-site validation of control equipment. It offers training for plant engineering, operations and maintenance teams on the use and upkeep of control systems. The firm also delivers preventive and corrective maintenance for control systems, whether originally installed by S2Control or by other providers. || S2Control provides industrial automation engineering, programming, commissioning, training, supplies, and maintenance services. | S2Control provides engineering and implementation services for industrial automation systems across sectors such as nuclear, aerospace, automotive, water treatment and food processing. The company designs control system architectures and documentation, selects and supplies instrumentation and control hardware, and programs PLC, SCADA, HMI, drives and robotic systems. S2Control carries out commissioning activities including installation, calibration, functional testing and on-site validation of control equipment. It offers training for plant engineering, operations and maintenance teams on the use and upkeep of control systems. The firm also delivers preventive and corrective maintenance for control systems, whether originally installed by S2Control or by other providers. | S2CONTROL nace en junio de 2020 de la mano de Rafael Sagrista, desde la experiencia de más de 17 años dedicados al sector del control industrial, tanto nacional como internacional. Las exigentes industrias nuclear, aeronáutica, y alimentaria, son la base del conocimiento de S2C para poder ofrecer soluciones de automatización de última generación. Realizamos el estudio de ingeniería de sistema de control completos, suministro y programación de PLC´s y sistemas SCADA´s y HMI´s, y la puesta en marcha. Para ello, somos expertos en las principales marcas del sector de la instrumentación y el control, destacando, entre otras, marcas como Siemens, Rockwell Automation, Omron, y Schneider. También somos expertos en la utilización de las principales marcas de brazos robot industriales como Universal Robot, Mitsubishi, ABB, Kuka, etc. S2CONTROL abarca desde pequeños proyectos, como la modificación de una máquina o equipo de una planta, hasta grandes proyectos como la automatización global de toda una industria.

It operates in three segments: Intelligent Devices, Software & Control, and Lifecycle Services. The company offers drives, motion, advanced material handling, safety, sensing, industrial components, hardware, software, and configured-to-order products; and control and visualization software and hardware, digital twin, simulation and information software, network and security infrastructure, and custom-engineered systems. It also provides digital consulting, professional services, engineered-to-order solutions, recurring services, cybersecurity, safety, remote monitoring, customer technical support and repair, asset management and optimization consulting, and training, as well as spare parts. The company sells its products through independent distributors in relation to its direct sales force. It serves discrete end markets, including automotive, semiconductor, e-commerce, and warehouse automation; hybrid end markets, such as food and beverage, life sciences, and tire; and process end markets comprising energy, mining, and chemicals. The company was formerly known as Rockwell International Corporation and changed its name to Rockwell Automation, Inc. in February 2002. name: KW Special Projects
description:
KW Special Projects operates within the high performance engineering sector – designing, manufacturing and supplying complete solutions. Founded by Kieron Salter, (founder and MD of KW Motorsport Ltd), KWSP provides services to meet the rapid growth in demand for a non-conventional approach to the integration of new processes and technologies into high performance engineering and manufacturing.   Guided by the principles of motorsport, the need for speed, efficiency and precision through the use of technology, materials and processes, KWSP takes a disruptive approach to a clients’ creative ideas - facilitating the transfer of knowledge from one sector to another. Based in Brackley adjacent to F1 team Mercedes AMG Petronas’s facilities, KWSP is at the heart of the UK’s thriving “Motorsport Valley” and part of a concentration of over 1000 companies in Northamptonshire that form the “High Performance Technologies Cluster”.    With 6000 sq ft of office and R&D workshop space, Unit 6 has the ability to facilitate large projects including design engineering, on-site assembly, testing, R&D and commissioning.  KWSP’s team are qualified post-graduate engineers. Our expertise is in exploiting the transferable nature of high performance technology from one sector to another. It works in the areas of Medical and Healthcare, Automotive, Food Manufacturing, Industrial Inkjet, Food Processing Industries, FMCG, Converting Industries and Associated Manufacturing. || About KWSP operates within the high performance engineering sector - designing, manufacturing and supplying complete solutions. name: Prologik Automation
description: Prologik provides total factory automation from goods in, processing, and packaging to finished goods dispatch. Our skilled team can turn your requirements into reality making our clients market leaders through factory automation. || Prologik provides total factory automation from goods in, processing, and packaging to finished goods dispatch. Our skilled team can turn your requirements into reality making our clients market leaders through factory automation. | Delivery automations solutions, exceeding customer expectations, adding value | Prologik Automation provides factory automation, controls, software, and system integration services for industrial manufacturers. | Prologik Automation provides factory automation and system integration services for industrial manufacturers. The company designs and implements control systems using PLC, SCADA, HMI, and robotics across automotive, food and beverage, FMCG, packaging, and related sectors. Prologik Automation delivers control panel design and build, electrical design and on-site installation, virtual commissioning, and offline and on-site robot and PLC programming. It also develops industrial software for applications such as Clean-in-Place systems, recipe management, industrial cooking kettles, and broader factory control. Additional services include vision systems integration, commissioning, and 24/7 service and support to maintain production facilities. Prologik Automation also offers turnkey controls solutions in collaboration with mechanical partners and process engineering firms.

We combine innovative technologies with extensive industry knowledge and experience, supporting customers throughout the asset lifecycle to enhance the performance of their business. As a platform independent provider of integrated solutions, our strength lies in the strong partnerships forged over the years with many of the major equipment manufacturers.
